visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white off-the-shoulder lace top and a patterned black-and-white bucket hat, stands in a large warehouse-style Costco store. She is smiling excitedly and gesturing towards a high shelf stacked with yellow cardboard boxes of 'Inari Mochi'. The background is filled with industrial shelving and large quantities of goods under bright warehouse lighting. Variety-style text overlays appear at the bottom. (2) The camera transitions to a close-up of the price tag on the shelf and the yellow box of 'Inari Mochi' by the brand Iris Ohyama. The woman's hands are seen touching the boxes, highlighting the product features. The setting remains the industrial aisle of the retail store. A large 'Costco Wholesale' logo is overlaid on the top of the frame throughout this segment. (3) The scene shifts to an indoor home environment, likely a dining area or kitchen. The woman is now sitting at a white table with three packages of the product spread out before her. In the background, a living room area with a television and plush toys is visible. The lighting is soft and warm. She holds up the individual components of the snack. (4) A close-up shot focuses on a white plate with blue stars as hands carefully insert a rectangular white mochi block into a brown, marinated tofu skin. The kitchen background is slightly blurred, showing a countertop and some utensils. The woman explains the preparation process through enthusiastic gestures and facial expressions. (5) The final phase shows the woman and another female companion sitting at the table, eating the heated mochi snacks from a Mickey Mouse plate. They pull the mochi apart with chopsticks to show its elastic texture, reacting with joyous facial expressions and smiles. The background remains the same home setting with soft indoor lighting.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 稻荷豆皮麻糬. (2) [Variety]: 我終於找到你了. (3) [Logo]: IRIS OHYAMA. [Variety]: 愛麗絲是我家狗狗狗籠的品牌. (4) [Variety]: 好Q. [Slogan]: $399. (5) [Variety]: 超多人敲碗不知好不好吃. [Slogan]: 開箱給大家看. [Variety]: 感覺就是一個只說真話. [Slogan]: 很正宗的日式點心. (6) [Slogan]: 超棒的100%的日本製. [Slogan]: 而且它微波就可以使用了哦. [Variety]: 那很方便. [Variety]: 總共12個. [Slogan]: 一份的豆皮麻糬是33塊. (7) [Slogan]: 推薦吃法加一個塞得進去的起司片. [Slogan]: 把它放進微波爐. (8) [Variety]: 加熱後的樣子. (9) [Variety]: 吃起來非常的好吃. [Variety]: 它的豆皮呢是認真調味過的豆皮. [Variety]: 不會有化學的味道. [Variety]: 就很像你在那個日本吃到那種豆皮一樣. [Variety]: 很有水準的調味. [Variety]: 好好吃哦. [Variety]: OK很好吃. [Variety]: 它的料理方式呢. (10) [Variety]: 麻糬才會達到這種牽絲的程度. [Variety]: 親子同玩都開心. [Variety]: 我們給出的評價是. [Variety]: 可以買. [Variety]: 特價時更一定要買. [Variety]: 好玩哎. [Variety]: 跟朋友跟小孩一起分享.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 1 female friend appearing in the tasting segment.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main woman has long dark hair, wearing a white off-the-shoulder lace top and a patterned bucket hat. Her friend has dark hair and wears a black beret.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video starts in a bright Costco warehouse with industrial shelving and bulk goods, then moves to a tidy home interior featuring a white dining table, a living room with a TV, and plush toys.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-energy female narration in Traditional Chinese, characterized by a bright, high-pitched vocal quality and a fast speech rate. A rhythmic, medium-tempo electronic pop BGM starts immediately, featuring a strong synthesizer bassline. Faint ambient background noise of a retail warehouse can be heard. (2) As the narration continues with high emotional arousal, a sharp, high-frequency digital 'ding' sound effect triggers to highlight the product's price. The BGM remains consistent, maintaining the upbeat energy without interruption. There are no significant ambient shifts in this warehouse segment. (3) A 'whoosh' transition sound effect marks the shift to an indoor setting. The room tone becomes quieter and more controlled. Sounds of crinkling plastic packaging and a soft percussive thud of objects being placed on a table are audible. The narrator's voice remains clear and projected over the BGM. (4) The sounds of a ceramic plate clinking and metallic kitchen tools being handled are heard as the narrator describes the preparation process. The BGM's steady beat continues to drive the rhythm. Brief pauses in speech are filled by the BGM and small incidental sounds of food preparation. (5) In the final segment, audible chewing and smacking sounds are followed by high-valence vocalizations like 'mmm' and enthusiastic exclamations. A comical, synthesized stretching sound effect is added during the mochi-pulling moment. The segment concludes with a final bright chime sound effect and a high-pitched concluding phrase.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Discovery -> Unboxing -> Preparation -> Tasting -> Recommendation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to review a popular food product found at Costco, providing viewers with information on its availability, price, preparation method, and taste to encourage them to purchase it.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed showcase of the product brand (Iris Ohyama) and retail location (Costco) with a highly positive recommendation.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high-density text and SFX layout typical of social media shorts to maintain high viewer engagement throughout the review process.
